pr.title: Record: 0.3212 BPB — Complementary N-gram 65K + Int5 GPTQ + LoRA TTT

output.summary: Combines complementary bigram-downweighting with 65K-token order-9 n-gram cache refresh, LoRA TTT adaptation, and full Hessian GPTQ int5 quantization.
techniques: Complementary training plus 65K-token order-9 n-gram cache refresh
Full Hessian GPTQ int5 with Soft-Round quantization-aware training
LoRA TTT with Polyak averaging for chunk-wise adaptation
